title: StoryLineU
body:
- **_ABOUT🌌:_**
This mod add new possibles to your Minecraft survive!
This mod creates for Uerty [youtuber] story-lines, and this mod is a trimmed mod with mechanics from its stories

- **_WHAT ADD?🕊:_**
New world[emptiness], new decor[radio] for your social with friends, new ui`s[for story].
And more in updates[soon]!

**_Try new mechanics now! See you soon player!_**
